channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: How a Supreme Court bombshell is redrawing the congressional map before November
item.description: From Alabama to New York, states are racing to redraw their congressional maps after a bombshell Supreme Court ruling gutted a key Voting Rights Act p...

item.title: Europeans Are Also Tired Of Dumb Leftists Ruining Everything They Touch
item.description: After years of ugly institutional decline, mass immigration from unvetted Islamist refugees who are eroding British culture, and a long period of comp...

item.title: Kathy Griffin calls Charlie Kirk a 'straight-up Nazi'
item.description: KATHY GRIFFIN on Charlie Kirk: "...that dude was a straight-up Nazi. And that is my opinion ... the way we've deified him is bizarre. I've never seen ...

item.title: You Didn’t Earn That: AOC’s Unintentional Confession
item.description: She cannot earn a billion dollars, because she is useless.
